ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Limited (ONGC) announced key leadership changes, appointing Shri Anupam Agarwal as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO), replacing Shri Yogish Nayak S., and formally designating Shri Satyan Kumar as a Key Managerial Personnel. Shri Agarwal brings over 35 years of deep financial and strategic experience in the oil and gas sector, notably managing significant funding and establishing a global treasury center at ONGC Videsh. These appointments reinforce ONGC's executive financial leadership and strategic management capabilities, with no immediate red flags identified regarding the company's financial health or governance.
